item.text: I’ll create the single self-contained agent and then run syntax plus representative legal-move checks without leaving any extra files.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "node --check agent.js && for fen in 'rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 1' '4k3/8/8/3pP3/8/8/8/4K3 w - d6 0 1' '4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1' '4r1k1/8/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1' 'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/R3K2R b KQkq - 0 1'; do printf '%s\\n' \""'$fen" | node agent.js; done'

/bin/zsh -lc "node --check agent.js && for fen in 'rnbqkbnr/pppppppp/8/8/8/8/PPPPPPPP/RNBQKBNR w KQkq - 0 1' '4k3/8/8/3pP3/8/8/8/4K3 w - d6 0 1' '4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1' '4r1k1/8/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1' 'r3k2r/8/8/8/8/8/8/R3K2R b KQkq - 0 1'; do printf '%s\\n' \""'$fen" | node agent.js; done'

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e \"let s=require('fs').readFileSync('agent.js','utf8'); s=s.replace(/const pos = parse[\\\\s\\\\S]*/, \\\"const pos=parse('4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1'); console.log(legal(pos).map(m=>[moveText(m),m.prom,m.ep,pos.b[m.t]]));\\\"); eval(s)\""

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "node -e \"let s=require('fs').readFileSync('agent.js','utf8'); s=s.replace(/const pos = parse[\\\\s\\\\S]*/, \\\"const pos=parse('4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1'); const moves=legal(pos); moves.sort((a,b)=>{const score=m=>(m.prom?100+v[m.prom]:0)+(m.ep?1:v[pos.b[m.t].toLowerCase()]); return score(b)-score(a)||moveText(a).localeCompare(moveText(b));}); console.log(moves.map(moveText));\\\"); eval(s)\""

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e \"let s=require('fs').readFileSync('agent.js','utf8'); s=s.replace(/const pos = parse[\\\\s\\\\S]*/, \\\"const pos=parse('4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1'); const moves=legal(pos); moves.sort((a,b)=>{const score=m=>(m.prom?100+v[m.prom]:0)+(m.ep?1:v[pos.b[m.t].toLowerCase()]); return score(b)-score(a)||moveText(a).localeCompare(moveText(b));}); console.log(moves.map(moveText));\\\"); eval(s)\""

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e \"let s=require('fs').readFileSync('agent.js','utf8'); s=s.replace(/const pos = parse[\\\\s\\\\S]*/, \\\"const pos=parse('4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1'); const z=legal(pos); const score=m=>(m.prom?100+v[m.prom]:0)+(m.ep?1:v[pos.b[m.t].toLowerCase()]); for(const m of z) console.log(moveText(m),score(m));\\\"); eval(s)\""

/bin/zsh -lc "node -e \"let s=require('fs').readFileSync('agent.js','utf8'); s=s.replace(/const pos = parse[\\\\s\\\\S]*/, \\\"const pos=parse('4k3/P7/8/8/8/8/8/4K3 w - - 0 1'); const z=legal(pos); const score=m=>(m.prom?100+v[m.prom]:0)+(m.ep?1:v[pos.b[m.t].toLowerCase()]); for(const m of z) console.log(moveText(m),score(m));\\\"); eval(s)\""
